feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: In SAC, how to setup aggregation type 'None' for measure/account dimensions to avoid auto summing
entry.content:
I have a model were we are loading all level data into the model. i.e leaf and parents level data is loaded from file into model. While reporting I want to disable the default aggregation type - SUM. So I have given 'None' for all the account members. Still my data is getting aggregated and added to the already loaded data at parent level and doubling the value.

How do we avoid this and perform a straight forward store and retrieve reporting.

Also tried to set aggregation type to 'None' in the measure settings, but could not see 'None' option available.

entry.title: How do visualizations auto‑scale inside Flow Layout Panels in Canvas Storie?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

in Canvas Design, How do visualizations automatically scale within Flow Layout Panels?
 
Thanks for any insights!

entry.title: Hierarchical presentations of dimension XY are not supported in a blended chart
entry.content:
I am developing a Budget Profit & Loss (P&L) Report in SAC that is required to be supported by an import scheduled job. The data will be coming from two data sources i.e. BW and Excel (organized as per the required layout).

I created two (2) models from the above-mentioned data sources. For the model, with data coming from the excel file, I made level 1, level 2, level 3 to be properties of Level 4 and created a level-based hierarchy. See sample excel file below:Note: The workaround of introducing a new dimension (Code) by duplicating the dimension ‘Level 4’ is an attempt to resolve the error message: "Hierarchical presentations of dimension XY are not supported in a blended chart"

I went ahead to design the report in SAC Stories, by blending the above model using dimension: Code with the BW model using the dimension: GL code. This approach allows me to schedule or automate the import job.

See below the output:

However, the desired output is this:

Previously, I had merged the models rather than blending to achieve the above desired output. This approach prevents me from scheduling or automating the import job which is desirable by the customer. See screenshot below, the import job button (highlighted in red) is greyed out.

Note: I get the same result when I upload the excel file from my local file or from Google drive.

In view of this, how do I achieve the desired output and still ensure that I can also schedule the import job especially coming from BW system?

SAP Analytics Cloud     BW (SAP Business Warehouse)

entry.title: Sap analytics Cloud - Transport the account dimension to production without transactional data
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are moving some developmente from our SAC DEV enviroment to the PRO enviroment. 

We have already a live model in PROD and we want to move some new developments. 

The thing is that the account dimension is not transporting the new account members that were created, and it looks like maybe we will need to create them manually in production. Because we can't select the data option, because it would pass transactional data, which is not an option since we have transactional data in production different from development. 

Does anyone know how we should process to transfer just the new account members and formulas created??

Thank you in advanced

entry.title: Extract a measure depending on a max measure
entry.content:
I have datas built this way.

I want to create an other measure that extracts the measure "tempo lordo lavorato" where the measure "qta colli" is maximum, aggregating on "centro di lavoro" and "codice materiale".

For example in this case the max "qta colli" for centro =M155 and "codice materiale" = 150.IG074.01 the new measure will be 330.

for the combination "centro" = M155 and "codice materiale" = 1C2P.F0424014 is 480.

The report will be interrogated filtering the period od analysis.
_________________________________________________________
These are the data and the problem of the partition is that the value is calculated day by day. For example If the users analyses this period It should obtain 397

For the quantity I can make a formula in the analytical model this way:

With Exception Aggregation dimensions: WORKCENTER – MATERIAL – ID_RILEVAZIONE

 

And I obtain by "BEST" (for the days selected)

but I'm wondering how I can obtain the related value 397.

entry.title: Reading parent totals in SAC Data Actions
entry.content:
Hi folks.

Does anybody know a way in SAC to retrieve the value at a parent node in a Data Action? (or Calc Measure for that matter).

My specific use case is: I want to retrieve the (aggregated) value of a particular measure at the parent of a given member and write that value to another measure, across a set of multiple specific members.
What I wish I could do would simply be something like:
DATA(Measure=TargetMeasure) = RESULTLOOKUP(Measure=Amount, MyDim=MyDim.MyParent) but that isn't supported.

In KBA 279311, SAP notes the limitation that RESULTLOOKUP only supports leaf members, and states "The feature to Support Parent/Formula member in Resultlookup in Data Action is in our backlog for future consideration".
Well it's been around 7 years since that was issued and it still isn't available. It's proving unbelievably difficult to simply grab a value from a hierarchy parent.

That same KBA suggests manually recomputing by summing the leaf members to reconstruct the parent total, but how can we do that in a dynamic way? We can only really use BASEMEMBER in a MEMBERSET statement, and those can't be used in a dynamic fasion, e.g. within conditional logic or loops. Otherwise I would happily just loop over all my relevant members and redeclare MEMBERSET = BASEMEMBER(MyParent) for each one, but that doesn't work either.

Considering how central hierarchies are to how SAC works, it is mind-boggling that you cannot simply look up the value on a parent node in either Calculated Measures or Data Actions. I understand that the Query Engine and the Calc Engine work differently but come on!

The only way I can come up with so far is to maintain explicit rollup attributes for every individual level of the hierarchy against every leaf member and construct the values from the bottom up for all ancestor nodes, looping over all leaves but this seems frankly ridiculous to have to maintain for multiple hierarchies with multiple levels. 

If anybody knows a better way to approach this, I would be grateful to hear it.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Calculated Measure for Balance Carryforward from different version
entry.content:
Hi, Everyone

 

I am working on balance carryforward and encountered the following situation.

I would like to have data from

Version : Estimate | Measure : CalculatedEnding | Date : Dec(2026)

to show as

Version : Annual Budget | Measure : Beginning | Date : Jan(2027)

 

so I create another Measure which is BeginningCarryforward to store number of 

Version : Estimate | Measure : Ending | Date : Dec(2026)

as show in capture. The formulas are working if Date is show as unbooked.

However, when i set Date as booked the result are as followed which is incorrect

My formulars in Calculated Measure are as followed

Please advise. Thank you so much

entry.title: Is it possible to restrict users from using S4HANA live connection in SAC?
entry.content:
Is it possible to restrict users from using S4HANA live connection in SAC? The users should still be able to run the stories or Insights that were created on S4 HANA Live connection.
I tried to restrict by unchecking below, but it did not work. Despite unchecking it I could execute the report that was built on S4 Live connection. So, this authorization right appears to be not working.


I came across an SAP note (3200367 - Restrict Connections for users in SAC) that says it is not possible and there's an idea registered on "Influence" portal regarding restricting users from using live connections. This idea is set for long term consideration.
Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence
The note is old, wanted to check if there's any recommendation? how others in the community manage this?

Thank you!
Parag

entry.title: SAC dashboard sorting and Top N ranking in charts/tables are reset on refresh
entry.content:
I have built a Supplier spend dashboard in SAC based on BW live data. The dashboard has been working fine until now (since April-25), but now there is an issue related to sorting in 2 bar charts and 1 table within the dashboard.

Bar charts; Showing Top 20 suppliers in specific year based on Ranking top 20. When I apply sorting on the Measure in EUR from highest to lowest and save the story, the sorting is reset to Supplier Names in alphabetical order when I refresh/re-open it. Table: No ranking applied on table, but the same issue with sorting Measure in EUR from highest to lowest. On refresh, the sorting is reset to alphabetical order based on Supplier Names.

(I have tried with bookmarks, creating new charts from scratch, using both Chrome and Edge, cleaning cache….but can´t make it work).

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Dynamic URL with Variables Values
entry.content:
Hello everybody

i like to open a dynamic url by clicking a button in the SAC. Following i made

Script Variable : GUID type String

Table with information about the value for the GUID. By select on Cell, the value is writen to the Varible GUID, this i have checked by log.

Button : Details, will open an external Hyperlink with the Variable {GUID} : HTTPS//:SAP-DETAIL&ExternalGUID={GUID}

But when i cklick on the button,  the value of GUID is not open in the URL, still the Name of {GUID}.

Can somebody help out? What could be the problem, or better how can i solve that?

Answers would be high apreciated.

Thanks a lot

Adrian

entry.title: Combination bar & Line chart
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to create a specific visualization in SAP Analytics Cloud  as shown in the attached image.

I have a Combination Column Line Chart with the following requirements:

  1. Bars: Represent "Total Revenue" (in Millions).

  2. Data Labels for Bars: I want the labels above the bars to show a different measure ("Percentage of Total") instead of the actual bar value (Millions).

  3. Lines: Two separate line measures with their own data labels.

entry.title: SAC Data Action – copy measure from one account to another on same intersection
entry.content:
trying to copy Measure = Price/Unit (Audit = Ld_C) from Account = COGM to  COGS for the same Profit Center + Product + Period.

Problem: After running the DA, the Price/Unit at COGM getting deleted, do not have any delete step too, refer below image

Data Action script

Query 1: How can I copy Price/Unit (Ld_C) from COGM to COGS on same intersection, not able to understand on where the issue is [pls refer above DA script

Query 2: How can I hide Price/Unit from displaying at the parent “Inv change” and "Other_OCOGS" while keeping values at the leaf accounts (COGS/COGM), can we achieve in styling?

@MoonJun  can you let me know where am I going wrong in my script?

entry.title: SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD - Hierarchy Update Issue - New members not added in <root>
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing the following case:

  • Public Dimension with Hierarchy, initially defined with a file. 
  • Hierarchy updated occasionally through file.
  • Leaf members updated daily.
    • On this import job there is no field matched to Hierarchy since it would override the parents already added through the file.
  • New parent members do not exist yet, since they are updated from a file. New base members are loaded with empty hierarchy (not root).
  • Other master data updates on the same dimension fail, since there are members without any value in the hierarchy field.

The target is to add new Public Dimension leaf members in <root> of the existing hierarchy without affecting the hierarchy members that already exist (since they are updated manually from a file source). This will prevent error on the daily master data updates and allow fact data of these members to present in stories without daily adding these new members in the root of the hierarchy. 

The dimension setting "Group and show under Not in Hierarchy" does not work since there is no mapping on Hierarchy field during import.

The option to load everything on <root> and then reimport manually (daily) the file with the known hierarchy info is not an approach that we want to use at the moment.

Is there an approach you would suggest me to try?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-in – Posting Date Filter for Multiple Tables + Previous Year Comparison + Dynamic Text
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently replicating SAC dashboards in SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in and need guidance on the following requirements.

Requirement 1 – Posting Date Filter (from SAC Model)

  • I have a Posting Date dimension coming from the SAC model into Excel Add-in.

  • I need to create a single Posting Date filter in Excel.

  • This filter should control 7 different tables in the same worksheet.

How can I create one Posting Date dimension filter in Excel Add-in that applies to multiple tables simultaneously?

Requirement 2 – Same Month Previous Year Table

Out of the 7 tables, let me explain using 2 Balance Sheet tables:

  • Table 1: Shows data based on selected Posting Date
    Example: If filter = April 2025 → Table 1 shows April 2025 data

  • Table 2: Should automatically show same month previous year
    Example: If filter = April 2025 → Table 2 should show April 2024 data

Is there a way in Excel Add-in to dynamically calculate and display “same month previous year” based on the main Posting Date filter selection? In SAC currently I have used restricted measures for running totals and MTD YTD calculations in my 7 tables based on single posting date filter selection.

Requirement 3 – Dynamic Textboxes for Dates

I also need dynamic text labels above both tables:

  • Textbox above Table 1 → Should display: Apr 2025

  • Textbox above Table 2 → Should display: Apr 2024

Is there a way in Excel Add-in to dynamically bind the selected Posting Date to a cell or textbox so it updates automatically when the filter changes?

If anyone has implemented something similar in SAC Excel Add-in, your guidance would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-in – How to Create MTD & YTD & Running Totals
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently working in SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in using a model imported from SAC and need guidance on the following requirements.

Requirement – Running Totals, MTD & YTD in Excel Add-in

I need to create: MTD (Month-to-Date),YTD (Year-to-Date) & Running Totals calculations in Excel Add-in based on the Posting Date dimension.

The model already contains:

  • Dimensions: G/L Account, Posting Date

  • Measure: Amount in Company Code

What is the approach to calculate them ?

Thankyou!!

entry.title: conditional formating on column totals in SAC
entry.content: How do I create conditional formatting on the column totals (bottom) in SAC (validate the total ie, the value between an interval).

entry.title: Script variables used in URL parameters don't seem to be recognized by iOS mobile app
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am attempting to navigate from Story A to Story B, and simultaneously pass the value of an input control from Story A to Story B. It appears that the variables and scripts I’ve set up work as expected on PC and iOS mobile browsers. However, they do not function correctly in the iOS mobile app. I’m unsure if specific design configurations are required to make this functionality work in the mobile app.

Below is my script. I created a script variable named "InputControl" in both Story A and Story B. In story A, I used: NavigationUtils.openStory('XXXXX','XXXXX',[UrlParameter.create("p_InputControl",Value1)],true). In Story B, I used: Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Success, InputControl);.

In PC or iOS mobile browser, I can see application message Value1 in story B; in the iOS app, the application message is blank. Has anyone encountered a similar issue before?

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAC How to generate new records between existing dates / records?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Imagine there are Actual and Forecast data but not for all months continuously . It is normal that data are not booked at each and every month. However, I need to calculate duration in months between the first and the last existing records. For example, in the picture below there are records for 2026.02, then 2026.07, and then 2027.05-2027.09. So, how to calculate DATEDIFF between 2026.02 and 2027.09 ?

As an option, I was going to generate value 1 for all involved months, so that sum of them will be equal to number of months between the first and the last record. It can be easily achieved for the booked months above but how to generate new records for 2026.03-2026.06 and 2026.08-2027.04 ?

Any ideas, please?

Br, Oleksandr

entry.title: Performance improvement of Dashboard in SAC using a data model with live connection
entry.content:
Hi All,

To my knowledge there is little or nothing that can be done at the frontend in SAC (SAP analytics cloud) story to improve the performance of a slow running story that uses a live connection. Could anyone please let me know if there are any steps that can be taken to achieve performance optimization/improvement in such a scenario? at the story level rather than the backend?

 

Regards,

entry.title: SAP Support Request – Comment Saving Error in SAC Story (Issue Occurs Only in One Specific Story)
entry.content:
Subject: Error when saving comments in an SAP Analytics Cloud Story – issue occurs only in one specific story after moving it to a secured SSBI folder

Issue Description

When attempting to save a comment in an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Story, the following error message appears:

“An error occurred while processing your request!
Please save the story and refresh the page!
If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator.”

The error occurs only when saving comments.
All other features and interactions within the story continue to work normally.

Also, creating a new folder within the SSBI Folder and adding a comment box referring to the same Modeller, works. Seem’s like it’s a story specific problem…
